title: Surface Preparation
shortDesc: Cleaning, grinding & sand blasting for a perfect base.
fullDesc: Thorough surface preparation is the foundation of any long-lasting coating. We use industrial degreasing, mechanical grinding, and high-pressure sand blasting to ensure the substrate is completely clean, dry, and profiled for maximum coating adhesion.

title: Rust Removal & Treatment
fullDesc: We apply proven rust removal techniques including mechanical wire brushing, chemical treatment, and complete rust conversion to eliminate corrosion at the source before any coating is applied.

title: Corrosion Protection
fullDesc: Our corrosion protection systems use multi-layer coating strategies including zinc primers, epoxy mid-coats, and polyurethane topcoats to create a barrier that withstands the harshest industrial chemical environments.

title: Industrial Coating
shortDesc: Epoxy, PU, Alkyd, Zinc & more coating systems.
fullDesc: We apply a full range of industrial coating systems tailored to the specific environment and substrate. From epoxy and polyurethane to alkyd and zinc-rich primers, we select the right system for maximum performance and longevity.

title: Structural Painting
shortDesc: For factories, plants, warehouses & heavy structures.
fullDesc: From large factory sheds and warehouse roofs to complex process plant structures and heavy steel frameworks, our team is equipped to handle structural painting projects of any scale with precision and safety compliance.
